title: Smart Typing Indicator
description: Implement an intelligent typing indicator that reduces noise while keeping users informed.
instructions:
Build a smart typing indicator system:

1. Typing detection on client:
   - Detect when user starts typing (first keystroke)
   - Send 'typing started' event to server
   - Send periodic 'still typing' events every 3 seconds while active
   - Send 'typing stopped' event when user stops for 2+ seconds or sends message

2. Server typing manager:
   - Broadcast typing events to appropriate recipients
   - Handle multiple users typing in the same chat
   - Auto-clear typing status if no update received for 5 seconds (client disconnected)

3. Smart display logic:
   - Show 'Someone is typing...' if you don't know who
   - Show 'User is typing...' for single user
   - Show 'User1 and User2 are typing...' for two users
   - Show 'Several people are typing...' for 3+ users

4. Privacy consideration:
   - Only show typing indicator in direct chats, not in large groups

hints.text: Use a Timer to track when typing stops - reset it on each keystroke.
On the server, maintain a Map<userId, lastTypingTime> and periodically clean up stale entries.
Consider adding a setting for users to disable sending their typing status for privacy.
